new_articles.title: The U.S. premium for SK Hynix is set to stay after Korean regulatory ruling
new_articles.summary: SK hynix 관련 기사다. 기사 제목은 'The U.S. premium for SK Hynix is set to stay after Korean regulatory ruling'이다. The huge premium commanded by SK Hynix ‘s American depository receipts over its domestically-listed ordinary shares is likely to remain, after restrictions were put in place on the number of ADRs that can be created by converting local shares. 이 기사는 해당 기업과 연결된 해외 보도를 바탕으로 정리했다. 가능한 경우 본문에서 회사 언급 전후 문맥을 함께 반영했다.

new_articles.title: Hyundai profit falls 21% on US tariffs, supply chain disruption
new_articles.summary: Hyundai Motor 관련 기사다. 기사 제목은 'Hyundai profit falls 21% on US tariffs, supply chain disruption'이다. SEOUL -- Hyundai Motor's operating profit fell more than 20% in the second quarter of this year as it was hit by high U. S. tariffs and a fire at an. Automaker confirms it is buying out SoftBank's stake in robotics startup Boston Dynamics. Automobiles Hyundai profit falls 21% on US tariffs, supply chain disruption Automaker confirms it is buying out SoftBank's stake in robotics startup Boston Dynamics A Hyundai Motor production line in South Korea The automaker's output in the second quarter was hit by a fire at an engine valve supplier (Nikkei montage/Source photos by Suzu Takahashi and Kotaro Hosokawa) KIM JAEWON July 23, 2026 18:46 JST SEOUL -- Hyundai Motor's operating profit fell more than 20% in the second quarter of this year as it was hit by high U tariffs and a fire at an engine valve supplier that hurt production of premium models. 이 기사는 해당 기업과 연결된 해외 보도를 바탕으로 정리했다.

new_articles.title: China’s new chip stores data with a single electron, breaking AI memory bottleneck
new_articles.summary: SK hynix 관련 기사다. 기사 제목은 'China’s new chip stores data with a single electron, breaking AI memory bottleneck'이다. How many electrons does it take to store a single bit of information? For today’s most advanced dynamic random access memory (DRAM) chips from Samsung and SK Hynix, the answer is roughly 200,000. That is the price of reliability – a vast reservoir of charge needed to ensure a “1” or “0” does not fade into noise. But a team at Fudan University in Shanghai has just collapsed that number to its theoretical floor: one. In a paper published in Science on July 16, microelectronics professor Zhou Peng. .

Weaker vehicle sales, production disruptions and higher costs outweigh ‌support from a weaker won. Hyundai Motor reports 21% drop in Q2 operating profit, misses forecasts Weaker vehicle sales, production disruptions and higher costs outweigh ‌support from a weaker won By Reuters Updated - July 23, 2026 at 01:42 PM ece Hyundai Motor reported a ‌21% fall in second-quarter operating ​profit on Thursday, missing ⁠analysts’ estimates, as weaker vehicle sales, production disruptions and higher costs outweighed ‌support from a weaker won Hyundai Motor said revenue ⁠rose 2% from a year earlier to 49 Shares of ‌Hyundai Motor were trading up 2% after the earnings announcement Hyundai forecasts macroeconomic uncertainty will persist and competition in the industry will be tougher. 이 기사는 해당 기업과 연결된 해외 보도를 바탕으로 정리했다.

new_articles.title: Hyundai Motor reports 21% drop in Q2 operating profit, misses forecasts
new_articles.summary: Hyundai Motor 관련 기사다. 기사 제목은 'Hyundai Motor reports 21% drop in Q2 operating profit, misses forecasts'이다. Channel NewsAsia is an English-language news organization based in Singapore. SEOUL, July 23 : Hyundai Motor reported a 21 per cent fall in second-quarter operating profit on Thursday, missing analysts' estimates, as weaker vehicle sales, production disruptions and higher costs outweighed support from a weaker won. Hyundai, which together with affiliate Kia Corp is the world's third-big. Click here to return to FAST Tap here to return to FAST FAST SEOUL, July 23 : Hyundai Motor reported a 21 per cent fall in second-quarter operating profit on Thursday, missing analysts' estimates, as weaker vehicle sales, production disruptions and higher costs outweighed support from a weaker won Hyundai, which together with affiliate Kia Corp is the world's third-biggest automaking group by sales, posted operating profit of 2 Hyundai Motor said revenue rose 2 per cent from a year earlier to 49 Hyundai forecasts macroeconomic uncertainty will persist and competition in the industry will be tougher Its weak performance underscores wider challenges facing the auto industry, as carmakers contend with rising energy and raw material costs as well as supply chain disruptions linked to U. 이 기사는 해당 기업과 연결된 해외 보도를 바탕으로 정리했다.

new_articles.title: South Korean labour unions push for higher payouts after Samsung’s US$400,000 bonus
new_articles.summary: Samsung Electronics, Hyundai Motor, HD Hyundai 관련 기사다. 기사 제목은 'South Korean labour unions push for higher payouts after Samsung’s US$400,000 bonus'이다. Labour unions are rallying across South Korea after Samsung Electronics caved in to protests and agreed to hand out bonuses of more than US$400,000 to some of its employees. Just this week, assembly-line workers at Hyundai Motor staged a three-day partial strike as they seek up to 30 per cent of consolidated profit to be set aside for bonuses. Meanwhile, unions at HD Hyundai Heavy Industries and telecoms operator LG Uplus want payouts equivalent to at least 30 per cent of operating profit, while. . Advertisement South Korea Asia East Asia South Korean labour unions push for higher payouts after Samsung’s US$400,000 bonus What began with workers calling for Samsung and SK Hynix to share profits reaped from the AI boom is spilling over to other industries 3 -MIN READ 3 -MIN 2 Bloomberg Published: 10:35am, 23 Jul 2026 Labour unions are rallying across South Korea after Samsung Electronics caved in to protests and agreed to hand out bonuses of more than US$400,000 to some of its employees Just this week, assembly-line workers at Hyundai Motor staged a three-day partial strike as they seek up to 30 per cent of consolidated profit to be set aside for bonuses Meanwhile, unions at HD Hyundai Heavy Industries and telecoms operator LG Uplus want payouts equivalent to at least 30 per cent of operating profit, while workers at Hanwha Aerospace and HD Hyundai Electric want to scrap bonus caps altogether A currency dealer walks in front of an electronic board displaying SK Hynix and Samsung Electronics stock prices and the Korea stock index at the dealing room of a bank in Seoul on July 16 Photo: Reuters What began with workers calling for Samsung and SK Hynix, the nation’s two biggest chipmakers, to share the banner profits they are reaping from the artificial intelligence boom is spilling over to industries that have little to do with AI. 이 기사는 해당 기업과 연결된 해외 보도를 바탕으로 정리했다.

matched_articles.title: 折りたたみ式スマホ薄型の新モデル発表 競争激化か
matched_articles.summary: Samsung Electronics 관련 기사다. 기사 제목은 '折りたたみ式スマホ薄型の新モデル発表 競争激化か'이다. 韓国のサムスン電子は、厚さ4ミリ余りと薄型で折りたたみ式のスマートフォンの最新モデルを発表しました。 折りたたみ式の機種は、IT大手アップルが今後初めて発売する見通しだと報じられていて、メーカーの間でこのタイプをめぐる競争が激しくなると予想されます。 折りたたみ式スマホ薄型の新モデル発表 競争激化か 2026年7月23日 5:04 IT・ネット 韓国のサムスン電子は、厚さ4ミリ余りと薄型で折りたたみ式のスマートフォンの最新モデルを発表しました。 7月20日 12:59 「51番目の州になりたい！ 이 기사는 해당 기업과 연결된 해외 보도를 바탕으로 정리했다.
